articles.title: Santa Clara beats No. 21 Saint Mary's 76-71, advances to WCC title game vs Gonzaga
articles.original_title: Santa Clara beats No. 21 Saint Mary's 76-71, advances to WCC title game vs Gonzaga
articles.summary: Sash Gavalyugov scored 23 points including a back-breaking 3-pointer to lead Santa Clara to a 76-71 victory over No. 21 Saint Mary's in the semifinals of the West Coast Conference Tournament on Monday night to take a big step toward making the Big Dance.  The Broncos (26-7) will play No. 12 Gonzaga (29-3) in the championship game on Tuesday night.  While the Bulldogs are safely in the tournament, Santa Clara was considered on the bubble.

articles.original_title: SGA ties Wilt, drains clutch 3s in MVP showdown
articles.summary: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander tied a more than 60-year-old record by Wilt Chamberlain before drilling a pair of clutch 3-pointers to hand the Nuggets a 129-126 loss.

articles.title: Leonard powers the Clippers past the Knicks to reach .500 for the first time since November
articles.original_title: Leonard powers the Clippers past the Knicks to reach .500 for the first time since November
articles.summary: Kawhi Leonard scored 29 points, Bennedict Mathurin added 28 points, and the Los Angeles Clippers beat the New York Knicks 126-118 on Monday night to climb back to .500 for the first time since early November.  The Clippers are 32-32 and have won five of their first six games in March as they try to improve their potential position in the NBA Play-in Tournament.  It was Leonard's 42nd straight game with 20-plus points, the second-longest active streak in the NBA and third-longest in team history.

articles.title: Detroit Mercy tops Robert Morris 70-64 in Horizon League semifinal, will play Wright State for title
articles.original_title: Detroit Mercy tops Robert Morris 70-64 in Horizon League semifinal, will play Wright State for title
articles.summary: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — Orlando Lovejoy had 21 points and Lance Stone came off the bench to score 16, leading Detroit Mercy to a 70-64 victory over Robert Morris on Monday night in a Horizon League Tournament semifinal.No. 3 seed Detroit Mercy (17-14) will play top-seeded Wright State in the championship game on Tuesday with an automatic berth in the NCAA Tournament on the line.Lovejoy made 5 of 14 shots and 11 of 12 free throws for the Titans, adding six assists.
